meaning: n.巫毒崇拜,蛇神,生性怪癖的人
examples: In this zombie world of ours, they are your ultimate kickass partner.
How would all those theories hold up under the pressure of a zombie assault?
The last thing you want in the face of an advancing zombie horde is a blown fuel sensor.
Falling from a tree stand into the gaping maw of a zombie can make you undead.
You can't take two zombie banks, put them together, and make a strong bank.
